title: Notifications  - Update failed
scenario: User taps notification after DFU fails in first 20% while app is backgrounded and is redirected to Software Update failure screen
steps: Start a DFU (Device Firmware Update) on a device.
Turn off the device while the app is in the background during the first 20% of the update process.
expected: A notification "Device didn't update" appears. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Poly Lens application's Software Update failure screen.
